heading: Claims for income, estate, gift, and certain excise taxes in receivership proceedings, etc.
label: 6871 Claims for income, estate, gift, and certain excise taxes in receivership proceedings, etc.

children.heading: Immediate assessment in receivership proceedings
children.label: a Immediate assessment in receivership proceedings
children.text: On the appointment of a receiver for the taxpayer in any receivership proceeding before any court of the United States or of any State or of the District of Columbia, any deficiency (together with all interest, additional amounts, and additions to the tax provided by law) determined by the Secretary in respect of a tax imposed by subtitle A or B or by chapter 41, 42, 43, or 44 on such taxpayer may, despite the restrictions imposed by section 6213(a) on assessments, be immediately assessed if such deficiency has not theretofore been assessed in accordance with law.

children.heading: Immediate assessment with respect to certain title 11 cases
children.label: b Immediate assessment with respect to certain title 11 cases

children.text: the debtor’s estate in a case under title 11 of the United States Code, or
the debtor, but only if liability for such tax has become res judicata pursuant to a determination in a case under title 11 of the United States Code,

children.heading: Claim filed despite pendency of tax court proceedings
children.label: c Claim filed despite pendency of tax court proceedings

children.text: claims for the deficiency and for interest, additional amounts, and additions to the tax may be presented, for adjudication in accordance with law, to the court before which the receivership proceeding (or the case under title 11 of the United States Code) is pending, despite the pendency of proceedings for the redetermination of the deficiency pursuant to a petition to the Tax Court; but
in the case of a receivership proceeding, no petition for any such redetermination shall be filed with the Tax Court after the appointment of the receiver.
